QBIS 2020 Table 5 reports direct FTE for a 1 GW offshore wind farm commissioned in 2022. Construction&Manufacturing is treated as cumulative direct job-years for development, wind turbine production, balance of plant, and installation/grid connection: 574+2655+2820+781=6830 FTE/GW = 6.83 job-yr/MW. Decommissioning (713 FTE/GW) is excluded. O&M is reported as 1907 FTE/GW over 25 years and annualized to 1907/1000/25=0.0763 job/MW. Indirect and induced jobs are calculated separately in QBIS 2020 Tables 6-7, so these factors are direct jobs only.

QBIS 2023 Figures 2.3-2.4 and Tables 2.1-2.2 report direct FTE/GW for 1 GW fixed and floating OWF models in 2022. Construction&Manufacturing is treated as cumulative direct job-years excluding O&M and decommissioning: fixed 131+2666+2608+996=6401 FTE/GW = 6.401 job-yr/MW; floating 208+4210+8348+1702=14468 FTE/GW = 14.468 job-yr/MW. O&M is reported over 25 years and annualized: fixed 2640/1000/25=0.1056 job/MW; floating 6041/1000/25=0.2416 job/MW. QBIS 2023 Chapter 3 separately adds indirect FTE using an input-output model, so Figures 2.3-2.4 and Tables 2.1-2.2 are direct jobs only.
